instructions: Step 1: Extract assets from your legally obtained ROM.
This creates clean editable YAML/config files and generates the vanilla masterlist.
Step 2: Choose your seed and any exclusions in Configs.
Step 3: Use Preview randomization when you want to see the result without writing YAML/config changes.
Step 4: Use Randomize YAML/configs to write the selected randomizer settings into the extracted files.
Step 5: Build randomized assets so zelda3_assets.dat is rebuilt from the randomized YAML/configs.
Use Restore vanilla YAML to return randomized YAML/configs to the saved vanilla masterlist before rerolling.
